channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Whiteboard and shoes left, 23rd May
item.description:
Above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cromford Path, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suspected public tree roots lifting pavement and nearby blocks on my drive, 23rd May
item.description:
The paving blocks outside my house have been raised around the public tree for a couple of years but the problem is getting worse. Also some of my drive blocks adjacent to this tree are also being raised. I suspect it is the public tree roots. Can someone come to have a look at it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged kerbstone, 23rd May
item.description:
Kerb had been damaged by delivery driver and has fallen away in to road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle left on private land blocking driveway & garage access, 23rd May
item.description:
Rogue Car parked on private driveway blocking garage access. Persistent blocking though May 2026. Driver confronted, he through away a notice to deciss.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cawston Court, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dressing table fly tipped, 23rd May
item.description:
Dressing table has been dumped for a couple of weeks now. Now being broken/mirrors smashed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Combe Avenue, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: 10 Streatly Road, 23rd May

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Garden needs cutting, 23rd May
item.description:
Garden is right outside my flats kitchen, bathroom and toilet window, it is over grown and has not been cut for a number of months. I can’t even open my windows due to this and there has been a flurry of insects. I have called council over 3 weeks ago whom informed that it will be sorted in 5 working days, nothings happened. I emailed the council earlier this week and have not received a reply.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown garden, 23rd May
item.description:
Garden is right outside my flats bedroom window, it is over grown and has not been cut for a number of months. I can’t even open my bedroom window due to this and there has been a flurry of insects. I have called council over 3 weeks ago whom informed that it will be sorted in 5 working days, nothings happened. I emailed the council earlier this week and have not received a reply.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned and incorrectly sorned, 23rd May
item.description:
Have spoken to the police as advised, they have come out and investigated and have said this is for the council to remove. Police call reference: CAD6320/11MAY26 No one from the council has been out to investigate
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
